discoveries.title: Natera: Financial assistance programs Program
discoveries.summary: Qualified patients

rawQuotes: Natera has robust financial assistance programs that can be offered to qualified patients to ensure that cost is not a barrier to testing
Natera accepts commercial and public insurances
Signatera™ is covered by Medicare for monitoring disease progression, disease recurrence, or relapse
Medicare patients diagnosed with solid tumors are fully covered if they meet one of these criteria: either recurrent, relapsed, refractory, metastatic, or advanced stages III or IV cancer
Natera is an in-network provider with most health plans, including Cigna and UnitedHealthcare. Natera also offers self-pay pricing and financial assistance options

discoveries.title: Tempus: Financial Assistance Program Program
discoveries.summary: Based on patient's household income and takes into account relevant life circumstances, such as medical debt or loss of income due to a patient's diagnosis

papProgram.name: Financial Assistance Program
papProgram.eligibility: Based on patient's household income and takes into account relevant life circumstances, such as medical debt or loss of income due to a patient's diagnosis

copayAssistance.notes: No specific copay assistance program mentioned

rawQuotes: Tempus accepts all insurance plans. Your out-of-pocket costs may vary depending on your plan benefits.
Through our financial assistance program, we help provide access to our tests and services to patients in financial need.
Approval is based on a patient's household income and takes into account relevant life circumstances, such as medical debt or loss of income due to a patient's diagnosis.
Payment must be made prior to testing. The test will be canceled if Tempus does not receive payment.
Online & Phone Applicants: You will receive an application decision at the time of submission.
Applications are available at access.tempus.com
Our Customer Support Team is available from 8:00 am CT – 5:00 pm CT, Monday through Friday at 800-739-4137

discoveries.title: Natera: Financial assistance programs Program
discoveries.summary: Qualified patients

rawQuotes: Natera has robust financial assistance programs that can be offered to qualified patients to ensure that cost is not a barrier to testing
Natera accepts commercial and public insurances
Signatera™ is covered by Medicare for monitoring disease progression, disease recurrence, or relapse
Medicare patients diagnosed with solid tumors are fully covered if they meet one of these criteria: either recurrent, relapsed, refractory, metastatic, or advanced stages III or IV cancer
Natera is an in-network provider with most health plans, including Cigna and UnitedHealthcare. Natera also offers self-pay pricing and financial assistance options

discoveries.summary: Based on patient's household income and takes into account relevant life circumstances, such as medical debt or loss of income due to a patient's diagnosis

rawQuotes: Tempus accepts all insurance plans. Your out-of-pocket costs may vary depending on your plan benefits.
Through our financial assistance program, we help provide access to our tests and services to patients in financial need.
Approval is based on a patient's household income and takes into account relevant life circumstances, such as medical debt or loss of income due to a patient's diagnosis.
Payment must be made prior to testing. The test will be canceled if Tempus does not receive payment.
Online & Phone Applicants: You will receive an application decision at the time of submission.
Applications are available at access.tempus.com
Our Customer Support Team is available from 8:00 am CT – 5:00 pm CT, Monday through Friday at 800-739-4137
